articles.author: Ramy  Inocencio
articles.title: WHO scales back number of suspected Ebola cases in Congo, but front-line medics say major challenges remain - CBS News
articles.description: While 330 Ebola infections are confirmed in central Africa and huge challenges remain, hundreds more suspected cases "have been cleared out," the WHO says.
articles.content: The United Nations' World Health Organization significantly scaled back on Tuesday the number of suspected Ebola cases in central Africa, lowering it to 116 from more than 900, with 330 total cases c… [+3182 chars]
